Society_Name: BHRTOA - BOLLINENI HILLSIDE RESIDENTIAL TOWNSHIP OWNERS ASSOCIATION
description:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to express my concern regarding the lack of timely communication about water shutdowns in our community.

It has been observed that notifications about water supply interruptions are being shared either just prior to the shutdown or, in some instances, not communicated at all. For example, today (4th April), water supply was interrupted multiple times without any prior notice. Additionally, a message from the FM office was received only at 3:06 PM stating that the water supply would be shut down 3:30 to  6:00 PM.

Such short notice does not provide residents with sufficient time to make necessary arrangements. This causes significant inconvenience and disrupts daily routines.

I kindly request that the management ensure water shutdown notifications are communicated at least one day in advance or, at a minimum, 6 hours prior to the scheduled interruption. Timely communication will help residents prepare accordingly and avoid unnecessary difficulties.

I hope you will take this matter seriously and improve the notification process going forward.

I am writing to bring to your immediate attention a severe safety hazard regarding a manhole cover located in front of VIBAA SUPER STORES.

The current manhole metal cover is in a very dilapidated condition and the edges of the manhole cover base is cracked. Because this area experiences heavy pedestrian footfall and vehicular movement due to the supermarket, it poses a significant and immediate risk of severe injury to pedestrians, especially children and the elderly, as well as potential damage to vehicles.

Given the urgency of the situation, I kindly request that you dispatch a maintenance team to inspect the site and repair or replace the damaged cover with a sturdy, heavy-duty replacement as soon as possible to prevent any unfortunate accidents.

I have attached a photograph of the damaged manhole cover for your reference.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter of public safety. I look forward to your quick action.

Society_Name: BHRTOA - BOLLINENI HILLSIDE RESIDENTIAL TOWNSHIP OWNERS ASSOCIATION
description:
Sir,
​Our pre school functions at the Block 13, Villa 14, Bollineni Hillside from Jun 2024 onwards. Today morning we found that the pipes connecting the air conditioner indoor in two rooms in the I floor and the outer units were cut and removed. The outer units are placed in the terrace and we do not usually move to the terrace.
​Since the ACs were not working and we called the mechanic for service today and he found the theft. This may cost us nearly Rupees 10,000 to 15,000 to re instal the units since we have to fill gas also.
​We bring it to your notice to make a thorough enquiry, since the security office is just 2 buildings away. We may have a formal complaint with police also.
​
Yours sincerely,
The i-School Perumbakkam

I kindly request you to arrange for immediate inspection and removal of the dead bird from the vent area, followed by proper cleaning and disinfection. This requires urgent attention to prevent any potential health risks.

Thank you for your prompt action
